category_sources: source_facts.description says it provides small git utilities.
docs_sources: source_facts.repo already points to the official GitHub project; README is the best official documentation surface from the supplied source facts.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/tj/git-extras, so repo is intentionally returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Git utilities; source_facts.executables lists many git-* command-line tools.
